load-pdf-verify-page-count.title: Load PDF and Verify Page Count
load-pdf-verify-page-count.description: Shows how to load a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf's Document class and confirm successful loading by reading the total number of pages.

check-pdf-encryption-and-toggle.title: Check PDF Encryption and Apply Decrypt/Encrypt
check-pdf-encryption-and-toggle.description: Demonstrates how to inspect a PDF's IsEncrypted property and then either decrypt it with the owner password or encrypt it with user/owner passwords using Aspose.Pdf.

decrypt-pdf-with-owner-password.title: Decrypt PDF with Owner Password
decrypt-pdf-with-owner-password.description: Demonstrates how to decrypt an encrypted PDF file using the owner password via Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSecurity.

encrypt-pdf-256-aes.title: Encrypt PDF with 256‑bit AES and Passwords
encrypt-pdf-256-aes.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt an existing PDF using 256‑bit AES, set user and owner passwords, apply a privilege, and save the protected document.

encrypt-pdf-rc4-40.title: Encrypt PDF with RC4‑40 using Aspose.Pdf
encrypt-pdf-rc4-40.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF file with the RC4‑40 algorithm and a user password using the Aspose.Pdf PdfFileSecurity facade.

encrypt-pdf-aes256-custom-permissions.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and Custom Permissions
encrypt-pdf-aes256-custom-permissions.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, apply AES‑256 encryption together with specific permissions, and save the encrypted document using Aspose.Pdf.

change-user-password-encrypted-pdf.title: Change User Password of Encrypted PDF While Preserving Encryption
change-user-password-encrypted-pdf.description: Shows how to open an encrypted PDF using its owner password, change the user password, and save the file while keeping all existing encryption settings intact.

update-owner-password-pdf.title: Update Owner Password of Protected PDF
update-owner-password-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to change only the owner password of an encrypted PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades without affecting the user password or permissions.

change-user-and-owner-passwords.title: Change User and Owner Passwords in PDF
change-user-and-owner-passwords.description: Demonstrates how to change both the user and owner passwords of an existing PDF in a single call while preserving the original security settings using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

set-pdf-privileges-allow-print-disallow-.title: Set PDF Privileges: Allow Print, Disallow Copy
set-pdf-privileges-allow-print-disallow-.description: Demonstrates how to modify a PDF's security settings to permit printing while preventing content copying, then saves the updated document.

set-pdf-privileges-allow-form-filling-di.title: Set PDF Privileges to Allow Form Filling and Disable Assembly
set-pdf-privileges-allow-form-filling-di.description: Demonstrates how to configure a PDF's security privileges using Aspose.Pdf.Facades to allow form filling while disabling document assembly.

disable-copying-keep-printing-enabled.title: Disable Copying While Keeping Printing Enabled for PDF
disable-copying-keep-printing-enabled.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to disable the copy permission on a PDF while leaving the printing permission enabled.

remove-usage-rights-from-signed-pdf.title: Remove Usage Rights from Signed PDF
remove-usage-rights-from-signed-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to bind a signed PDF, check for embedded usage rights, remove them, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

check-pdf-extended-usage-rights.title: Check PDF for Extended Usage Rights
check-pdf-extended-usage-rights.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF file to the PdfFileSignature facade and determine whether it contains extended usage rights using the ContainsUsageRights method.

remove-usage-rights-from-pdf.title: Remove Usage Rights from PDF and Verify Removal
remove-usage-rights-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to remove usage rights from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, verify the removal with ContainsUsageRights, and save the updated document.

encrypt-pdf-with-password-and-capture-ex.title: Encrypt PDF with Password and Capture Exceptions
encrypt-pdf-with-password-and-capture-ex.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using a user and owner password with 256‑bit AES, enable AllowExceptions to capture errors, and log detailed exception information.

apply-pdf-privilege-allow-exceptions-fal.title: Apply PDF Privilege with Exception Propagation
apply-pdf-privilege-allow-exceptions-fal.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSecurity to set a document privilege while disabling internal exception handling so that any errors are thrown to the caller.

encrypt-pdf-save-to-memorystream.title: Encrypt PDF and Save to MemoryStream
encrypt-pdf-save-to-memorystream.description: Shows how to create a PDF in memory, apply AES‑128 encryption with user and owner passwords and specific permissions, and then save the encrypted document to a MemoryStream ready for network transmission.

encrypt-pdf-from-byte-array.title: Encrypt PDF from Byte Array
encrypt-pdf-from-byte-array.description: Shows how to load a PDF from a byte array, apply user and owner passwords using PdfFileSecurity, and return the encrypted PDF as a byte array.

encrypt-pdf-with-user-password-only.title: Encrypt PDF with User Password Only
encrypt-pdf-with-user-password-only.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades by supplying only a user password while leaving the owner password undefined.

apply-password-protection-to-pdf.title: Apply Password Protection to an Existing PDF
apply-password-protection-to-pdf.description: Shows how to encrypt an existing PDF with user and owner passwords using the PdfFileSecurity facade, without recreating the document object.

retrieve-pdf-encryption-algorithm.title: Retrieve PDF Encryption Algorithm
retrieve-pdf-encryption-algorithm.description: The example loads a PDF file with Aspose.Pdf, checks whether it is encrypted, and prints the encryption algorithm (CryptoAlgorithm) to the console.

validate-pdf-encryption-before-decryptio.title: Validate PDF Encryption Before Decryption
validate-pdf-encryption-before-decryptio.description: The example checks whether a PDF file is encrypted using PdfFileInfo, copies it unchanged if not, and if it is encrypted, attempts to decrypt it with the owner password via PdfFileSecurity.

batch-encrypt-pdf-files.title: Batch Encrypt PDF Files with User and Owner Passwords
batch-encrypt-pdf-files.description: Shows how to encrypt every PDF in a directory using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSecurity with the same user and owner passwords, saving the encrypted copies to an output folder.

batch-decrypt-pdfs.title: Batch Decrypt PDFs Using Owner Passwords
batch-decrypt-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to read a JSON configuration file and batch‑decrypt multiple PDF files using their owner passwords with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSecurity.

bulk-change-pdf-user-password.title: Bulk Change PDF User Password
bulk-change-pdf-user-password.description: Iterates through a folder of PDF files and sets a common user password on each document using Aspose.Pdf's security facade.

update-pdf-owner-password.title: Update PDF Owner Password While Preserving User Password
update-pdf-owner-password.description: Demonstrates how to iterate over multiple PDF files and change only the owner password using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, leaving the existing user password unchanged.

encrypt-pdfs-based-on-filename.title: Encrypt PDFs with Conditional CryptoAlgorithm Based on File Name
encrypt-pdfs-based-on-filename.description: Demonstrates encrypting PDF files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, selecting the key size and algorithm (AES or RC4) according to naming conventions and applying a print‑only privilege.

pdf-encryption-report-generator.title: Generate PDF Encryption Algorithm Report
pdf-encryption-report-generator.description: Scans a directory of PDF files, checks if each file is encrypted, retrieves the encryption algorithm via Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo (using reflection for version differences), and writes a CSV‑style usage report.

encrypt-pdf-rc4-128-allow-print-edit.title: Encrypt PDF with RC4‑128 and Allow Print/Edit
encrypt-pdf-rc4-128-allow-print-edit.description: Demonstrates combining document privileges to permit printing and content modification, then encrypting a PDF using RC4 with a 128‑bit key via Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

decrypt-edit-save-pdf-facades.title: Decrypt, Edit, and Save PDF Using Aspose.Pdf Facades
decrypt-edit-save-pdf-facades.description: Demonstrates how to conditionally decrypt an encrypted PDF with PdfFileSecurity, modify its text using PdfContentEditor, and save the updated document while handling temporary files.

encrypt-decrypt-pdf-integrity-check.title: Encrypt and Decrypt PDF with Integrity Check
encrypt-decrypt-pdf-integrity-check.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF with user/owner passwords, decrypt it using the owner password, and verify round‑trip integrity by comparing page count and extracted text.

encrypt-pdfs-and-log-encryption-time.title: Encrypt PDFs and Log Encryption Time
encrypt-pdfs-and-log-encryption-time.description: Shows how to encrypt PDF files with Aspose.Pdf.Facades and measure the time taken for each encryption using Stopwatch.

encrypt-pdf-aes256-to-cloud.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and Save to Cloud Bucket
encrypt-pdf-aes256-to-cloud.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf to encrypt a PDF with AES‑256 and write the encrypted file to a cloud storage URI or local path.

decrypt-pdf-using-owner-password-from-az.title: Decrypt PDF Using Owner Password from Azure Key Vault
decrypt-pdf-using-owner-password-from-az.description: Demonstrates retrieving an owner password from Azure Key Vault and using Aspose.Pdf.Facades to decrypt a protected PDF file.

change-pdf-passwords-from-csv.title: Change PDF User and Owner Passwords from CSV
change-pdf-passwords-from-csv.description: Shows how to read a CSV file containing PDF paths and passwords, then use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSecurity to change both user and owner passwords and save the updated PDFs.

encrypt-pdf-stream-rc4-40.title: Encrypt PDF Stream with RC4‑40 using Aspose.Pdf
encrypt-pdf-stream-rc4-40.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF from a stream, apply RC4‑40 encryption with Aspose.Pdf, and return the encrypted PDF as a memory stream.

pdf-encryption-summary.title: Generate PDF Encryption Summary CSV
pdf-encryption-summary.description: Scans a folder of PDF files, uses Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo to detect encryption status and document privileges, and writes the results to a CSV summary file.

test-decryption-fails-with-incorrect-own.title: Test Decryption Fails with Incorrect Owner Password
test-decryption-fails-with-incorrect-own.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using an owner password and verify that decryption throws an InvalidPasswordException when a wrong owner password is provided, using Aspose.Pdf.Facades in a unit test.
